purpose: Govern generated food images used in the final recipe review card.
plain_english: The review image is the shop-window photo. It can make a recipe easier to judge, but it is not recipe logic and it must not add ingredients that are not in the approved recipe artifacts.
prompt_rules: Use only the recipe title, approved component names, approved visible ingredients, and approved plating logic.
Name any ingredients that must be visible.
Name any ingredients that must not appear.
Request no text, no labels, no logos, and no extra garnish unless the garnish exists in the approved recipe.
Use a retail review-card style, but keep the food truthful.
blocks_final_review_if: image shows ingredients not in the recipe
image hides the main recipe identity
image contains text, logos, or brand claims
visual truth check is not PASS
